home.title: Unmatched
home.subtitle: Zero duplicates. Total cooperation. The web-based word game where great minds mustn't think alike.

join.roomNotFound: Room not found. Check the code and try again.
join.alreadyStartedSubtitle: This room is in the middle of a match. Ask your friends to start a new game when they're done.

game.clueInstruction: Give a <bold>one-word</bold> clue that helps the guesser find this word.
game.clueInstructionTwo: Give two <bold>one-word</bold> clues that help the guesser find this word.
game.filterInstruction: Remove clues that are too similar or violate game rules. Only valid and unique clues should remain for the guesser.
game.guessInstruction: Analyze the surviving clues and identify the secret word.

waiting.title: Wait a bit!
waiting.pendingClues: Some players still need to submit their hints.
waiting.filterBody: <bold>{{name}}</bold> is working on validating the clues.
waiting.guessBody: <bold>{{name}}</bold> is working on guessing the word.
waiting.validateBody: <bold>{{name}}</bold> is working on validating the answer.

validate.title: Moment of truth
validate.hint: As the Filterer, you decide if their logic is close enough to count!

finish.subtitle4: Not bad. You could certainly do better.
finish.subtitle7: Average. It's a good start. Try again!
finish.subtitle9: Good. A first step towards glory?
finish.subtitle11: Very good! You should be proud!
